prompt: We're considering raising a Series A at $15M pre-money. We're profitable at $4M ARR with 40% margins, growing 10% MoM. The VC wants 20% equity and a board seat. Should we take the money or stay bootstrapped?

assertions.text: Output contains all 4 rounds (Round 1 through Round 4)
Visionary, Skeptic, and Pragmatist personas all appear and are distinct
Every challenge in Round 2 has a severity rating (critical/significant/minor)
Round 3 contains at least one concession where the Visionary acknowledges a valid challenge
Round 4 contains one of the 4 valid verdicts
Debate metrics include a confidenceScore between 1-10
A review date is specified for revisiting the decision
Risks accepted section exists with specific risk references
